stem: Rectangles ABCD and EFGH are similar. The length of each side of EFGH is 6 times the length of the corresponding side of ABCD. The area of ABCD is 54 square units. What is the area, in square units, of EFGH?
explanation: When each side is scaled by 6, the area is scaled by 6² = 36. So the area of EFGH is 36(54) = 1,944 square units. Choice B, 36, is only the scale factor for area, not the resulting area.
